creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
In the meantime I moved to 11.0-RELEASE, installed from scratch, and am currently at:

pacija@mephala:~ % freebsd-version -ku
11.0-RELEASE-p2
11.0-RELEASE-p3

dbus and consolekit are at:
dbus-1.8.20
consolekit-0.4.5_4

I am still getting these messages:
Nov  4 12:17:21 mephala dbus[574]: [system] Rejected send message, 2 matched rules; type="method_call", sender=":1.14" (uid=1001 pid=879 comm="") interface="org.freedesktop.ConsoleKit.Manager" member="CanSuspend" error name="(unset)" requested_reply="0" destination=":1.2" (uid=0 pid=759 comm="")
Nov  4 12:17:21 mephala dbus[574]: [system] Rejected send message, 2 matched rules; type="method_call", sender=":1.14" (uid=1001 pid=879 comm="") interface="org.freedesktop.ConsoleKit.Manager" member="CanHibernate" error name="(unset)" requested_reply="0" destination=":1.2" (uid=0 pid=759 comm="")

Searching around the web I found the following page:
http://www.ne-g.sakura.ne.jp/freebsd/20161030-04.html

...which says the solution is to add the following lines to ConsoleKit.conf:

<allow send_destination="org.freedesktop.ConsoleKit"
  send_interface="org.freedesktop.ConsoleKit.Manager"
  send_member="CanSuspend"/>
<allow send_destination="org.freedesktop.ConsoleKit"
  send_interface="org.freedesktop.ConsoleKit.Manager"
  send_member="CanHibernate"/>

I have no idea what these do. Could someone with knowledge of dbus look into it and - if true - confirm this is a good solution? Perhaps create patch for the next port revision?

Thank you in advance,
